title: How to Hit Your Opponent (SSBU)

Today I wanted to talk about a concept
that I feel like I go over in basically
every lesson that I ever have or every
student that I ever have in my lessons,
which is basically how to hit people.
And I know that might sound simple. You
just hit them. But I wanted to talk

and different characters and stuff like

infinite amount of pixels that are

all the way across the stage, right? But

behind your opponent. Attacking between
you and your opponent is called
undershooting. So you expect your
opponent to move forward. You expect

"Hey, I'm going to hit you first."
Right? That can be with a tilt. It can

you know, aggressive characters or

you dash forward and then hit them. Of

everything kind of is further, which
